docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF;S CLAIM MAILED TO BY CERTIFIED MAIL TO INGRID EBELING RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, UNCLAIMED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY AUSTIN, RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT EBELING, INGRID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUSTIN, RONALD

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS REPRESENTED BY RAYMOND AVILES - BROKER FOR LAUREL PROPERTIES AND JULIE AVILES - PROPERTY MANAGER OF LAUREL PROPERTIES. PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVES ARE INFORMED THAT THEY ARE NOT AUTHORIZED TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OG THE PLAINTIFF. PER PLAINTIFF'S REPS, THE PLAINTIFF IS OUT OF THE COUNTRY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. . JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUSTIN, RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT EBELING, INGRID
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF FILED BY EBELING, INGRID
